vocab.meaning: một công việc/nhiệm vụ gây nản lòng
vocab.example: Delving into advanced calculus was a daunting undertaking for me, as I’ve always struggled with complex equations.

vocab.meaning: bị bao phủ trong sự bí ẩn (khó hiểu)
vocab.example: To me, the core principles of quantum mechanics are still shrouded in mystery despite my best efforts to study them.
Learning Mandarin Chinese presented a formidable challenge due to its intricate tonal system and logographic characters.
The nuances of macroeconomics were often beyond my grasp, no matter how many times I re-read the textbook.

vocab.meaning: quá trình gian khổ, tốn nhiều công sức
vocab.example: Memorizing the vast periodic table and its chemical properties was an arduous process during my high school years.

vocab.meaning: gây mệt mỏi cho trí não
vocab.example: I found structural engineering to be particularly taxing on the brain because of the precision required.

vocab.meaning: một vấn đề cực kỳ khó giải quyết/khó hiểu
vocab.example: Algorithms and data structures proved to be a hard nut to crack during my first semester in computer science.

vocab.meaning: thuật ngữ chuyên ngành không thể hiểu nổi
vocab.example: Legal studies felt like a foreign language to me, filled with incomprehensible jargon and archaic Latin phrases.

vocab.meaning: không có đủ kỹ năng/kiến thức để làm gì
vocab.example: I felt ill-equipped for a degree in fine arts since my creative abilities were never my strongest suit.

vocab.meaning: vật lộn với (một vấn đề khó khăn)
vocab.example: Many students, including myself, have to grapple with the complexities of historical analysis and critical theory.
